recommendations.title: Fear Below
recommendations.overview: A rag-tag team of divers attempting to salvage a sunken car from a river are thwarted by a highly aggressive bull shark.

recommendations.title: The Prize of Peril
recommendations.overview: In a futuristic society, contestants pit their survival skills against each other in a fight to the death for cash prizes, and the contest is aired live on television.

recommendations.title: Daredevil vs. Spider-Man
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Action, Crime, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Spider-Man and Daredevil team up to fight Kingpin.

recommendations.title: Ra.One
recommendations.overview: When the titular antagonist of an action game takes on physical form, it's up to the game's less powerful protagonist to save the world.

recommendations.title: Chak De! India

recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction

recommendations.title: Shin Godzilla
recommendations.overview: When a massive, gilled monster emerges from the deep and tears through the city, the government scrambles to save its citizens.  A rag-tag team of volunteers cuts through a web of red tape to uncover the monster's weakness and its mysterious ties to

recommendations.title: Rollerball
recommendations.overview: In a corporate-controlled future, an ultra-violent sport known as Rollerball represents the world, and one of its powerful athletes is out to defy those who want him out of the game.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction

recommendations.title: King Kong
recommendations.overview: In 1933 New York, an overly ambitious movie producer coerces his cast and hired ship crew to travel to mysterious Skull Island, where they encounter Kong, a giant ape who is immediately smitten with the leading lady.
